name: Retinal Ganglion Cell Encoding Models
description: Build encoding models to predict how retinal neurons respond to visual stimuli and quantify visual information transmission.
problem_statement: How do neurons encode sensory information? The retina is an ideal model system with well-defined inputs and outputs.
technical_approach: Linear-Nonlinear models, GLMs, and CNNs to learn receptive fields from stimulus-response data. Information theory analysis.
